xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__LOG_SLICE_HDR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Slice index when the event was logged"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__MEM_CURR_BYTES
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Running count of bytes processed in current operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_TIME_CNT_PEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_STAT_CNT_PEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of status messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_ALIVE_TH_PEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of seconds to check for aliveness"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_CRIT_TIME_PEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time when critical data section was updated"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_TIME_CNT_PEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_STAT_CNT_PEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of status messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_ALIVE_TH_PEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of seconds to check for aliveness"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_CRIT_TIME_PEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time when critical data section was updated"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_TIME_CNT_FPEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_STAT_CNT_FPEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of status messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_ALIVE_TH_FPEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of seconds to check for aliveness"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_CRIT_TIME_FPEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time when critical data section was updated"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_TIME_CNT_FPEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_STAT_CNT_FPEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of status messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_ALIVE_TH_FPEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of seconds to check for aliveness"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_CRIT_TIME_FPEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time when critical data section was updated"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_TIME_CNT_CFPEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_STAT_CNT_CFPEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of status messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_ALIVE_TH_CFPEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of seconds to check for aliveness"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_CRIT_TIME_CFPEV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time when critical data section was updated"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_TIME_CNT_CFPEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_STAT_CNT_CFPEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of status messages sent to payload"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_ALIVE_TH_CFPEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of seconds to check for aliveness"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PL_CRIT_TIME_CFPEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time when critical data section was updated"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_MTR_CMD_CNT_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Count of motor commands from Axis controller"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG0_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder mergeEncoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG1_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG2_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_IS_CAL_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Zero if encoder cal required, otherwise cal data is valid"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_CAL_STAT_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder cal in progress, succeeded, or failed/aborted, 2 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_RSVD_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Reserved encoder field, no datasheet info, 1 bit"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_FREE_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder responses showing no errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_DIG_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder encoder readhead digital faults"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_CSEC_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder responses with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_FRA_CSEC_EL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder frames with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_MTR_CMD_CNT_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Count of motor commands from Axis controller"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG0_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder mergeEncoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG1_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG2_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_IS_CAL_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Zero if encoder cal required, otherwise cal data is valid"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_CAL_STAT_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder cal in progress, succeeded, or failed/aborted, 2 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_RSVD_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Reserved encoder field, no datasheet info, 1 bit"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_FREE_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder responses showing no errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_DIG_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder encoder readhead digital faults"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_CSEC_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder responses with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_FRA_CSEC_AZ
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder frames with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_MTR_CMD_CNT_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Count of motor commands from Axis controller"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG0_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder mergeEncoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG1_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_MRG2_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder merge margin, invalid during initial cal, 6 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_IS_CAL_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Zero if encoder cal required, otherwise cal data is valid"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_CAL_STAT_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Encoder cal in progress, succeeded, or failed/aborted, 2 bits"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_RSVD_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Reserved encoder field, no datasheet info, 1 bit"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_FREE_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder responses showing no errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_DIG_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for encoder encoder readhead digital faults"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_ERR_CSEC_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder responses with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__AXIS_EN_FRA_CSEC_PR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder frames with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__WFOV_RCV_ERR_CSEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Count of consecutive receive errors from the WFOV"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__WFOV_RCV_ERR_CNT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Count of cummulative receive errors from the WFOV"

xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counter for consecutive encoder frames with errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__SW_WFOV_ERR_CSEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Count of consecutive receive errors from the WFOV"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__MSG_RCV_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in seconds when the last time message was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__MSG_RCV_SUB
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in subsecond when the last time message was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PPS_RCV_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in seconds when the last time pulse was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__PPS_RCV_SUB
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in subseconds when the last time pulse was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__TIME_UP_CNT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time updates that have been performed"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__TIME_SINCE_MSG
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time in seconds since the last message."

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__TIME_SINCE_UP
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time in seconds since the last time sync."

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__TIME_SYNC_MAX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Max Number of seconds between time sync (PPS) since reset"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__TIME_SYNC_MIN
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Min Number of seconds between time sync (PPS) since reset"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__SV_RCV_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in seconds when the last sv message was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__SV_RCV_SUB
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in subsecond when the last sv message was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: ICIE__SV_SINCE_MSG
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time in seconds since the last message."

xtce:SequenceContainer.name: CCSDSPacket
xtce:SequenceContainer.xtce:LongDescription: Super-container for telemetry and command packets
